label: Hantavirus-associated cluster on Dutch-flag cruise ship MV Hondius (2026)
label_zh: 荷兰籍游轮MV Hondius汉坦病毒相关群聚事件（2026年）
deck: Multi-country outbreak. As of 11 May: 9 cases (7 confirmed, 2 probable), 3 deaths. MV Hondius arrived Tenerife 10 May; full repatriation complete 11 May (94 people, 19 nationalities). Ship sails for Rotterdam decontamination. All 147 aboard under 42-day monitoring (Day 0 = 6 May 2026).
deck_zh: 多国疫情。截至5月11日：9例（7例确认，2例可能），3例死亡。MV Hondius于5月10日抵达特内里费；5月11日完成全部遣返（94人，19个国籍）。船启航前往鹿特丹进行去污消杀。全部147名在船人员接受42天监测（第0天=2026年5月6日）。

primary_source.name: WHO DON599 — Hantavirus cluster, multi-country (4 May 2026)

secondary_source.name: ECDC — Hantavirus-associated cluster, cruise ship (6 May 2026)

situation_snapshot.notification: 2 May 2026 — WHO notified by UK IHR Focal Point; ECDC notified by Netherlands via EWRS.
situation_snapshot.notification_zh: 2026年5月2日——英国IHR联络点通报世卫组织；荷兰通过EWRS通报欧洲疾控中心。
situation_snapshot.vessel: MV Hondius, Dutch flag, operated by Oceanwide Expeditions. Departed Ushuaia, Argentina 1 April 2026.
situation_snapshot.vessel_zh: MV Hondius，荷兰旗，Oceanwide Expeditions运营。2026年4月1日从阿根廷乌斯怀亚出发。
situation_snapshot.itinerary: Ushuaia → Antarctica → South Georgia → Nightingale Island → Tristan da Cunha → St. Helena → Ascension Island → Cabo Verde → Canary Islands (Spain).
situation_snapshot.itinerary_zh: 乌斯怀亚 → 南极洲 → 南乔治亚岛 → 南丁格尔岛 → 特里斯坦-达库尼亚 → 圣赫勒拿岛 → 阿森松岛 → 佛得角 → 加那利群岛（西班牙）。
situation_snapshot.persons_aboard: 147 total: 88 passengers + 59 crew; 23 nationalities (EU/EEA countries include BE, DE, ES, FR, GR, IE, NL, PL, PT).
situation_snapshot.persons_aboard_zh: 共147人：88名乘客 + 59名船员；23个国籍（欧盟/欧洲经济区国家包括BE、DE、ES、FR、GR、IE、NL、PL、PT）。
situation_snapshot.counts_as_of_7_may: 11 cases total; 9 confirmed (PCR/serology); 2 probable; as of 22 May 2026; 3 deaths
situation_snapshot.counts_as_of_7_may_zh: 共11例；截至2026年5月22日9例确认（PCR/血清学）+2例可能；3例死亡
situation_snapshot.laboratory: ANDV confirmed by PCR/serology in 6 of 8 cases as of 9 May. Cases 3, 2, 5 confirmed earlier (NICD, Netherlands, Switzerland labs). Serology, sequencing and metagenomics ongoing at Institut Pasteur de Dakar. Argentina's Tierra del Fuego epidemiology director: 'almost zero' probability of Ushuaia zoonotic acquisition.
situation_snapshot.laboratory_zh: 截至5月9日，8例中6例经PCR/血清学确认为ANDV。第3、2、5号病例此前分别由NICD、荷兰、瑞士实验室确认。血清学、测序及宏基因组学检测在达喀尔巴斯德研究所进行中。阿根廷火地岛流行病学主任表示：乌斯怀亚人畜共患感染概率「几乎为零」。
situation_snapshot.index_cases: Cases 1 and 2 (Dutch couple) had travelled through Argentina, Chile, and Uruguay for ~4 months before boarding — believed primary zoonotic exposure pre-embarkation.
situation_snapshot.index_cases_zh: 1号和2号病例（荷兰夫妇）登船前已在阿根廷、智利、乌拉圭旅行约4个月——推测为登船前的原发性人畜共患暴露。
situation_snapshot.working_hypothesis: Zoonotic acquisition by index cases in South America (endemic Andes virus rodent reservoir); subsequent limited person-to-person transmission in closed-ship setting.
situation_snapshot.working_hypothesis_zh: 指示病例在南美洲（安第斯病毒啮齿动物储存宿主流行地区）发生人畜共患感染；随后在密闭船舶环境中发生有限的人传人传播。
situation_snapshot.risk_eu_population: ECDC (9 May): EU/EEA general population risk VERY LOW; passengers/crew risk MODERATE. All 147 aboard reclassified as high-risk contacts; 42-day monitoring (Day 0 = 6 May 2026). WHO: global risk LOW; 'not the start of a pandemic.' ANDV reservoir absent from European rodents.
situation_snapshot.risk_eu_population_zh: 欧洲疾控中心（5月9日）：欧盟/欧洲经济区一般人群风险极低；在船乘客/船员风险中等。全部147名在船人员被重新列为高风险接触者；42天监测（第0天=2026年5月6日）。世卫组织：全球风险低；「这不是一场大流行的开始」。欧洲啮齿动物中不存在ANDV储存宿主。

timeline.event: MV Hondius departs Ushuaia, Argentina (147 aboard).
timeline.event_zh: MV Hondius从阿根廷乌斯怀亚出发（147人在船）。

timeline.event: Case 1 (Dutch male, 70) develops fever, headache, diarrhoea on board.
timeline.event_zh: 1号病例（荷兰男性，70岁）在船上出现发热、头痛、腹泻。

timeline.event: Case 1 dies aboard; respiratory distress. Ship between South Georgia and St. Helena.
timeline.event_zh: 1号病例在船上死亡；呼吸窘迫。船位于南乔治亚岛与圣赫勒拿岛之间。

timeline.event: Case 2 (Dutch female, 69, wife of Case 1) disembarks at St. Helena with GI symptoms. Body of Case 1 removed.
timeline.event_zh: 2号病例（荷兰女性，69岁，1号病例妻子）携胃肠道症状在圣赫勒拿岛下船。1号病例遗体运离。

timeline.event: Case 2 deteriorates on flight to Johannesburg.
timeline.event_zh: 2号病例在飞往约翰内斯堡的航班上病情恶化。

timeline.event: Case 2 dies at Johannesburg hospital. Case 3 (British male) evacuated from Ascension Island to South Africa ICU.
timeline.event_zh: 2号病例在约翰内斯堡医院死亡。3号病例（英国男性）从阿森松岛撤离至南非重症监护室。

timeline.event: Case 4 (German female) dies on board. South Africa lab confirms hantavirus PCR-positive in Case 3 — first lab confirmation, 21 days after first death.
timeline.event_zh: 4号病例（德国女性）在船上死亡。南非实验室确认3号病例汉坦病毒PCR阳性——首次实验室确认，距首次死亡已21天。

timeline.event: WHO announces investigation. Ship moored off Cabo Verde.
timeline.event_zh: 世卫组织宣布调查。船停泊在佛得角外海。

timeline.event: WHO DON599 issued: 7 cases (2 confirmed, 5 suspected), 3 deaths. Dutch woman (Case 2) post-mortem PCR confirmed.
timeline.event_zh: 世卫组织DON599发布：7例（2例确诊，5例疑似），3例死亡。荷兰女性（2号病例）死后PCR确认。

timeline.event: ECDC assessment published. Swiss man (Case 5) PCR confirmed. Ship heads to Canary Islands.
timeline.event_zh: 欧洲疾控中心评估报告发布。瑞士男性（5号病例）PCR确认。船前往加那利群岛。

timeline.event: 5 of 8 suspected cases confirmed (WHO briefing). 3 symptomatic passengers transferred to Spain for care.
timeline.event_zh: 8例疑似病例中5例确认（世卫组织简报）。3名有症状乘客转运至西班牙接受治疗。

timeline.event: WHO confirms 6 of 8 cases laboratory-confirmed (PCR/serology); 0 suspected cases remain on ship. US CDC arranges evacuation flight: Offutt AFB, Omaha → National Quarantine Unit, Univ. Nebraska Medical Center. Argentina's Tierra del Fuego epidemiology director states 'almost zero' chance index cases contracted ANDV in Ushuaia.
timeline.event_zh: 世卫组织确认8例中6例已获实验室确认（PCR/血清学）；船上0例疑似病例。美国疾控中心安排遣返航班：奥马哈奥富特空军基地→内布拉斯加大学医学中心国家检疫隔离单元。阿根廷火地岛流行病学主任表示指示病例在乌斯怀亚感染ANDV的概率「几乎为零」。

timeline.event: ECDC publishes Rapid Scientific Advice: all 147 aboard classified as high-risk contacts; 42-day quarantine/monitoring (Day 0 = 6 May 2026). Updated totals: 6 confirmed + 2 probable, 0 suspected. WHO Director-General Tedros flies to Spain; meets PM Sánchez and accompanies health/interior ministers to Tenerife command post. Repatriation flights arranged by Germany, France, Belgium, Ireland, Netherlands, US, and UK. Ship (MV Hondius) expected to arrive Granadilla, Tenerife, 10 May.
timeline.event_zh: 欧洲疾控中心发布快速科学建议：147名在船人员均被列为高风险接触者；42天检疫/监测（第0天=2026年5月6日）。最新数据：6例确认+2例可能，0例疑似。世卫组织总干事谭德塞飞赴西班牙，与首相桑切斯会面，并陪同卫生/内政部长赶赴特内里费指挥中心。德国、法国、比利时、爱尔兰、荷兰、美国、英国安排遣返航班。MV Hondius预计5月10日抵达特内里费格拉纳迪利亚港。

timeline.event: MV Hondius arrives Granadilla, Tenerife. Disembarkation begins; Spanish nationals evacuated first. 18 US citizens (17 Americans + 1 British-American) airlifted to Offutt Air Force Base, Nebraska on US government charter. CDC launches Andes virus situation summary page.
timeline.event_zh: MV Hondius抵达特内里费格拉纳迪利亚港。开始下船；西班牙籍乘客优先疏散。18名美国公民（17名美国人+1名旅美英国人）乘美国政府包机飞往内布拉斯加州奥富特空军基地。美国疾控中心发布安第斯病毒情况摘要页面。

timeline.event: ECDC update: 9 total cases (7 confirmed + 2 probable), 3 deaths. US: 18 passengers evaluated at Univ. Nebraska Medical Center — 1 mildly positive (asymptomatic, biocontainment), 15 in National Quarantine Unit, 2 symptomatic transferred to Emory University biocontainment unit (Atlanta). Full disembarkation complete: 94 people from 19 nationalities repatriated. MV Hondius sails for Rotterdam (~25 crew) for full decontamination. CDC: no cases of Andes virus reported in the US from this outbreak; risk to American public extremely low.
timeline.event_zh: 欧洲疾控中心更新：共9例（7例确认+2例可能），3例死亡。美国方面：18名乘客在内布拉斯加大学医学中心接受评估——1人轻度阳性（无症状，生物隔离中）、15人在国家检疫隔离单元、2名有症状者转至埃默里大学（亚特兰大）生物隔离病房。全部下船完成：94人（19个国籍）完成遣返。MV Hondius携约25名船员启航前往鹿特丹进行全面去污消杀。美国疾控中心：此次疫情尚无在美确诊病例；对美国公众的风险极低。

timeline.event: New confirmed case: France — female passenger in her 60s (comorbidities) developed acute symptoms on return flight, admitted to ICU with severe lung and heart failure. New confirmed case: Spain — former passenger confirmed positive. Both were MV Hondius passengers.
timeline.event_zh: 新增确认病例：法国——一名60多岁女性乘客（有基础疾病），在返程航班上出现急性症状，因严重肺部和心脏衰竭入住重症监护室。新增确认病例：西班牙——一名前乘客确认阳性。二者均为MV Hondius乘客。

timeline.event: WHO DON601 published: 11 total cases (8 confirmed, 2 probable, 1 inconclusive), 3 deaths, 27% case-fatality ratio. Since DON599 (8 May): 2 new confirmed (France, Spain) + 1 inconclusive (US, Nebraska Medicine). Working hypothesis confirms onboard human-to-human transmission supported by near-identical genetic sequences. Global risk assessed as low.
timeline.event_zh: 世卫组织DON601发布：共11例（8例确认、2例可能、1例待定），3例死亡，病死率27%。自DON599（5月8日）起新增：2例确认（法国、西班牙）+1例待定（美国，内布拉斯加州医疗机构）。工作假设确认船上人传人，基因序列高度相似佐证。全球风险评估为低。

timeline.event: ECDC publishes 'Advice on laboratory testing of Andes virus (ANDV) for high-risk contacts under the MV Hondius outbreak.' ECDC press conference held on management of contacts.
timeline.event_zh: 欧洲疾控中心发布《MV Hondius疫情高危接触者安第斯病毒实验室检测建议》。欧洲疾控中心就接触者管理召开新闻发布会。

timeline.event: ECDC update: no new cases or deaths since previous update. Total remains 11 (8 confirmed, 2 probable, 1 inconclusive), 3 deaths. All 147 former passengers/crew continue 42-day monitoring. Risk to EU/EEA general population very low.
timeline.event_zh: 欧洲疾控中心更新：自上次更新以来无新增病例或死亡。合计仍为11例（8例确认、2例可能、1例待定），3例死亡。147名前乘客/船员继续接受42天监测。欧盟/欧经区普通人群风险极低。

timeline.event: ECDC daily update (17 May 2026): 9 confirmed + 2 probable + 1 inconclusive = 12 total cases; 3 deaths (was 8 confirmed + 3 probable/suspected)
timeline.event_zh: 欧洲疾控中心每日更新（2026年5月17日）：9例确认+2例可能+1例待定=共12例；3例死亡

timeline.event: ECDC daily update (19 May 2026): 9 confirmed + 2 probable = 11 total cases; 3 deaths (was 9 confirmed + 3 probable/suspected)
timeline.event_zh: 欧洲疾控中心每日更新（2026年5月19日）：9例确认+2例可能=共11例；3例死亡

sankey.nationalities_note: 23 nationalities: NL · GB · DE · CH · ES · BE · FR · GR · IE · PL · PT + 12 others
sankey.split_rule: Precautionary pool (139) vs. 8-case hantavirus cluster — WHO DON599
sankey.outcome_rule: 3 deaths (NL ×2, DE ×1); 1 ICU S. Africa (GB); 3 transferred Canary Islands (nat. TBC); 1 Switzerland (CH); 6 of 8 PCR/serology-confirmed as of 9 May 2026

outcomes.label: Fatal
outcomes.detail: 3 deaths (1 aboard ship; 2 after evacuation to Johannesburg/aboard)

outcomes.label: ICU / Critical
outcomes.detail: 2 in intensive care: Case 3 (British male) + France case (female, 60s, lung/heart failure)

outcomes.label: Transferred / Recovering
outcomes.detail: 3 cases transferred to hospital care (Switzerland, Spain, others)

outcomes.label: Post-disembark / Monitoring
outcomes.detail: Cases identified after disembarkation; under monitoring

outcomes.label: Inconclusive / Under investigation
outcomes.detail: 1 inconclusive case (US, Nebraska Medicine) — awaiting further lab testing

sankey.prediction_note: 45-day monitoring window per WHO guidance (incubation up to 8 weeks). Scenario projections below are illustrative — they are not WHO or ECDC forecasts.

scenarios.label: Strong IPC (optimistic)
scenarios.rule: R ≈ 0.96 — analogous to Andes post-control (Epuyén 2019 NEJM)
scenarios.rule_zh: R ≈ 0.96 — 类比安第斯干预后（埃普延2019年NEJM）

scenarios.label: Base case (incubation tail)
scenarios.rule: Some contacts in 7–42 day window yet to develop symptoms
scenarios.rule_zh: 部分接触者处于7–42天窗口期，尚未出现症状

scenarios.label: Stress test (late isolation)
scenarios.rule: Social mixing before full isolation; upper-tail estimate
scenarios.rule_zh: 完全隔离前已有社交混合；上限估计

decision_tree.if: Unexplained cluster of severe febrile illness with respiratory / GI features on a passenger vessel, especially after transit through South America.
decision_tree.if_zh: 客船上出现无法解释的严重发热性疾病群聚，伴有呼吸道/消化道症状，尤其是途经南美洲后。
decision_tree.then: Declare a public health event of concern on board: activate medical surge, create line list, collect exposure histories (ports, excursions, animal contact, close contacts), notify flag state and competent port authority under IHR 2005.
decision_tree.then_zh: 在船上宣布公共卫生关注事件：启动医疗应急、建立病例清单、收集接触史（港口、岸上游览、动物接触、密切接触者），根据《国际卫生条例》2005年通知旗国和主管港口当局。
decision_tree.note: Matches the 2 May 2026 UK IHR notification that triggered WHO response (DON599).
decision_tree.note_zh: 符合2026年5月2日英国IHR联络点触发世卫组织应对的通报（DON599）。

decision_tree.if: Any person develops fever with rapid progression to pneumonia, ARDS, or shock.
decision_tree.if_zh: 任何人出现发热并迅速进展为肺炎、急性呼吸窘迫综合征或休克。
decision_tree.then: Medical evacuation to a facility with full ICU capability as a priority; collect blood/respiratory specimens before or during transfer; notify receiving country.
decision_tree.then_zh: 优先医疗转运至具备完整重症监护能力的设施；在转运前或转运中采集血液/呼吸道标本；通知接收国。
decision_tree.note: Cases 3 and 4 illustrate rapid deterioration: Case 3 evacuated Ascension → South Africa ICU; Case 4 died 4 days after symptom onset.
decision_tree.note_zh: 3号和4号病例说明病情迅速恶化：3号病例从阿森松岛撤离至南非重症监护室；4号病例出现症状4天后死亡。

decision_tree.if: PCR or serology confirms hantavirus / ANDV, or clinical picture is strongly consistent and other pathogens excluded.
decision_tree.if_zh: PCR或血清学确认汉坦病毒/安第斯病毒，或临床表现高度吻合且其他病原体已排除。
decision_tree.then: Cohort-nurse confirmed and suspected cases; strict cabin isolation; trace all close contacts (shared cabin, meals, activities); apply droplet + contact precautions; airborne precautions for aerosol-generating procedures.
decision_tree.then_zh: 对确诊和疑似病例进行同病种护理；严格舱室隔离；追踪所有密切接触者（共住舱室、用餐、活动）；实施飞沫+接触防护；产生气溶胶操作时实施空气防护。
decision_tree.note: ECDC: person-to-person ANDV transmission documented with close prolonged contact; all 147 aboard treated as contacts (closed environment).
decision_tree.note_zh: 欧洲疾控中心：已记录密切持续接触的安第斯病毒人传人传播；147名在船人员均视为接触者（密闭环境）。

decision_tree.if: Closed vessel environment — everyone shares social spaces and activities.
decision_tree.if_zh: 密闭船舶环境——所有人共享社交空间和活动。
decision_tree.then: Apply precautionary principle: treat all aboard as close contacts until epidemiological investigation refines risk tiers.
decision_tree.then_zh: 应用预防原则：在流行病学调查明确风险层级之前，将所有在船人员视为密切接触者。
decision_tree.note: Explicit in both WHO DON599 and ECDC assessment for this cluster.
decision_tree.note_zh: 世卫组织DON599和欧洲疾控中心评估均明确提出此要求。

decision_tree.if: Patient will disembark or transfer between jurisdictions.
decision_tree.if_zh: 患者将下船或在不同司法管辖区间转运。
decision_tree.then: Provide written symptom-monitoring instructions for 45 days (up to 8-week incubation possible). Ensure receiving jurisdiction is notified. PCR / serology at time of disembarkation — note that negative tests early in illness do not exclude infection.
decision_tree.then_zh: 提供45天症状监测书面指导（潜伏期最长可达8周）。确保通知接收管辖区。下船时进行PCR/血清学检测——注意早期阴性结果不能排除感染。
decision_tree.note: WHO advises 45-day monitoring window. Swiss case (Case 5) identified post-disembark at St. Helena — underlines need for follow-up.
decision_tree.note_zh: 世卫组织建议45天监测窗口。5号病例（瑞士人）在圣赫勒拿岛下船后被识别——强调跟踪随访的必要性。

decision_tree.if: Healthcare facility receives a patient from the ship or an epidemiologically linked contact.
decision_tree.if_zh: 医疗机构接收来自船上或流行病学相关接触者的患者。
decision_tree.then: Standard + droplet precautions for all suspect/confirmed ANDV cases; escalate to airborne precautions for aerosol-generating procedures. Document exposure history; alert IHR focal point if transferring across borders.
decision_tree.then_zh: 对所有疑似/确诊安第斯病毒病例实施标准+飞沫防护；产生气溶胶操作时升级为空气防护。记录接触史；如跨境转运，通知IHR联络点。
decision_tree.note: WHO and ECDC IPC guidance; secondary healthcare-worker infections documented in prior ANDV outbreaks.
decision_tree.note_zh: 世卫组织和欧洲疾控中心感染防控指南；既往安第斯病毒疫情中已记录继发性医护人员感染。

decision_tree.if: Media, passengers, or shore-side communities ask whether widespread community spread is likely.
decision_tree.if_zh: 媒体、乘客或岸上社区询问是否可能出现广泛社区传播。
decision_tree.then: Cite WHO assessment: global risk low. ANDV rodent reservoir absent from Europe. Transmission requires close, prolonged contact — not airborne spread comparable to COVID-19.
decision_tree.then_zh: 引用世卫组织评估：全球风险低。欧洲不存在安第斯病毒啮齿动物储存宿主。传播需要密切、持续接触——不同于类似新冠的空气传播。
decision_tree.note: WHO Director-General Tedros, 7 May 2026: 'Not the start of a pandemic.' Low EU/EEA population risk affirmed by ECDC.
decision_tree.note_zh: 世卫组织总干事谭德塞，2026年5月7日：'这不是一场大流行的开始。'欧洲疾控中心确认欧盟/欧洲经济区人群风险低。
